stemHtml: Whilst on final approach, your instruments indicate a gradual, unexpected increase in headwind. What will happen to your groundspeed, and how should you respond?

options.a: Groundspeed decreases; reduce the rate of descent.
options.b: Groundspeed decreases; increase the rate of descent.
options.c: Groundspeed increases; reduce the rate of descent.
options.d: Groundspeed increases; increase the rate of descent.
